root_cause: Volume restoration from snapshot is failing, preventing PVC provisioning
evidence: PVC is requesting a volume from a VolumeSnapshot data source
Provisioning failures explicitly mention snapshot or restore context
No successful provisioning event was observed

Dominant provisioning error: failed to provision volume with dataSource "db-snapshot-2026-03-24": restore from snapshot failed because VolumeSnapshotContent snapcontent-db-snapshot-2026-03-24 is not ready

causes.message: CSI failed to provision a volume from a snapshot source
CSI external-provisioner repeatedly retries the restore workflow
Pod cannot start because the restored volume is unavailable

pvc:restore-db-data: PVC is snapshot-backed and provisioning from snapshot failed
pod:restore-db-0: Pod is blocked waiting for a volume restored from snapshot

likely_causes: VolumeSnapshot or VolumeSnapshotContent is not ready or is missing
CSI driver does not support restoring this snapshot into the requested volume
Snapshot metadata is incompatible with the target restore request
Cloud or backend restore API rejected the request
